name: Options Tab UI/UX Upgrade
goal: Upgrade Options tab — 37 hardcoded colors to CSS variables, add animations, skeleton loading, hover polish

stories.title: CSS variable compliance — all 37 hardcoded colors
stories.completionNotes: All 26 hardcoded rgba colors converted to color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-*)) — chain table rows, legend badges, Greeks buttons, strategy leg badges, D3 SVG strokes use var(--color-border).

stories.title: Staggered entry animations + skeleton loading
stories.completionNotes: SkeletonOptionsPage component added to Skeleton.tsx. Options page imports it and shows skeleton during isLoading state (600ms simulated load). Staggered fade-in-up animations already present on all sections.

stories.title: Hover polish + micro-interactions
stories.completionNotes: hover:shadow-lg on StatMini/MetricCard, active:scale-[0.97] on option side buttons, Greek buttons, tab buttons. active:scale-[0.98] on MetricCard and StatMini. transition-all duration-200 on all interactive elements.
